description:
GPU-accelerated terminal multiplexer built with Tauri


What's New
Features
- Codex CLI Log Panel — Browse Codex CLI session logs from the sidebar
- Window State Guard — Fix abnormally small window on HiDPI displays
Improvements
- Git background sync interval reduced from 10s to 5s
- Security: XSS prevention (DOMPurify), session_id validation, directory traversal performance
